item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Good people doing good things!
item.description: Not mine but I found it quite sweet so thought it was worth sharing!! Edit : details here https://visdeurbel.nl/en/the-fish-doorbell/ Edit again : if you click the link and there are more than 950 viewers you can't ring the bell, but it changes constantly so even by the time you refresh the page the viewers have gone down and you can check for the fish!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Images of Note:They know
item.description:
owo
P A I N
NOBODY can stop him
Snakes under the pillow
I found a new hat
oh no
*GLUGS A JAR OF MAYO*
G L A S S
WHAT DO YOU MEAN BY THIS CONCERNED APE???
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Great_Male_Renunciation
Any country that uses the West African or Central African Franc is basically a part of an unofficial French Empire that France still exploits. When Guinea declared independence, France destroyed the country's infrastructure before leaving, forcing the country to pick up from square 1.
Oh they knew
WHAT'S UP MAYODRINKERS
'TWAS MAYO DRINKING DAY
Cursed clown
0w0
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay also I'm twitchin' http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii

item.title: Just learned about the sugar-free Haribo Gummy Bears
item.description:
https://www.amazon.com/review/R2JGNJ5ZPJT4YC?ref=d6k_applink_bb_dls&dplnkId=504efe82-b1b3-41e3-8a05-56c3aa0026de After seeing a commercial for Haribo gummy bears, I was confused by my partner's reaction. He just said Google "Haribo sugar-free gummy bears", and this was the first review that popped up. I am dying, but not as much as 'Luke' did that day. Seeing as I am late to the party on this topic, I am sure this has been posted before, but I hope it brings you all a good laugh regardless.
Lemon Tax <3
item.dc:creator: 2orangekitties

item.title: It's another unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
about to brew a truck driver... greetings online friends
i want that jacket now also
i also prefer crunch water but because of the cold
not all restaurants provide it
muthaflippin icons
mmm hmm
i wonder what it tastes like
we all remember the 'snake scene'
this little fucker is a cheater
just a city boy
i can taste these. oh man they were so good
it has to also be the exact shade of blue seen in the video
everyone's favorite weapon
typical Michael
yes
dang
legitimate question
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
